description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head with a single broad cutting edge and a squared poll. The blade is securely mounted to a straight, cylindrical wooden handle, which is reinforced with two black metal bands—one near the head and one at the base. The handle has a natural wood grain texture and a slightly bulbous end for improved grip and control. The axe head is matte black, with a utilitarian, functional design and no visible decorative elements. The overall construction suggests durability and practical use, suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. No visible branding or markings are present on the axe.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a matte black metal head and a straight, wood-textured handle reinforced by black metal bands. The design is functional and robust, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded end of the wooden handle and the broad, flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile of the axe, including the wide cutting edge, straight handle, and reinforcing metal bands.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the length of the handle, the attachment of the head, and the metal band at the base.
description_view_3: Oblique view emphasizing the blade's edge, the poll, and the handle's wood grain texture.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible grain, reinforced by black metal bands, slightly bulbous at the end for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad cutting edge with a squared poll, matte black finish, no beard, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metal bands for reinforcement.
